name: phoebe-data-skills
description: Phoebe's modular data skills - install only the ones you need. Each ships a runnable baseline python script you tune with Claude.

plugins.name: how-to-eda
plugins.description: Decision-first exploratory data analysis - explore a dataset and surface what to act on.

plugins.name: how-to-eda-codex
plugins.description: Trust-first EDA - integrity, profiling and forensic checks before you build on the data.

plugins.name: how-to-rfm
plugins.description: RFM customer segmentation for retention and marketing spend.

plugins.name: how-to-schema-and-warehouse
plugins.description: Turn a raw data dump into a queryable star-schema warehouse with a data contract.

plugins.name: how-to-schema-consolidation
plugins.description: Audit a multi-server table estate and schema-diff before merging drifted copies.
